seoTitle: Pacific Haven vs Pacific Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pacific Haven and Pacific Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pacific Haven vs Pacific Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pacific Haven and Pacific Heights.
heading: Pacific Haven vs Pacific Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pacific Haven, Queensland and Pacific Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pacific Haven has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pacific Heights (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pacific Haven or Pacific Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pacific Haven has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Pacific Heights scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pacific Haven scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Pacific Heights scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pacific Haven or Pacific Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pacific Haven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
